source_issue.title: Align Guru Team extension version and release tag to v0.6.5

proposed_issue.title: Align Guru Team extension version and release tag to v0.6.5
proposed_issue.body:
## Background

Guru Team Trellis extension already has a canonical manifest and installed provenance support, but the current manifest version remains `0.1.0` while release/tag discussion moved toward Trellis CLI-aligned `0.6.5` release coordinates.

A previous test confirmed Trellis CLI `0.6.5` supports workflow marketplace `#ref`, including `gh:castbox/guru-trellis/trellis#guru-team/v0.6.5`. The team now prefers the simpler repo-level release tag `v0.6.5` because this repository is dedicated to Guru Team extensions for Trellis.

## Requirement

- Align `trellis/guru-team-extension.json.version` to `0.6.5`.
- Update public docs and preset/workflow docs to recommend tag-pinned workflow marketplace usage with `v0.6.5`.
- Document that repo release tags use `vX.Y.Z` and should match `trellis/guru-team-extension.json.version`.
- Keep `guru-team` workflow template id unchanged.
- Keep Trellis official CLI version, `.trellis/.version`, marketplace `index.json.version`, and Guru Team extension version clearly separated.
- After the PR merges, create and push annotated tag `v0.6.5` on the merge commit.
- After `v0.6.5` is verified, retire the previously created `guru-team/v0.6.5` tag to avoid two competing release coordinates.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Manifest version is `0.6.5`.
- Docs show `gh:castbox/guru-trellis/trellis#v0.6.5` examples for `trellis init` and `trellis workflow` where tag-pinning is appropriate.
- Docs explain that mutable `main` is acceptable for latest/canary usage, while `#vX.Y.Z` is the stable install form.
- Tests or validation confirm the JSON manifest is valid and current docs/scripts remain coherent.
- Release/tag operation order is documented: merge first, then tag the merged commit, then optionally delete old namespaced tag.

## Out of Scope

- Do not change Trellis upstream source or global npm packages.
- Do not change workflow template id `guru-team`.
- Do not create `v0.6.5` before manifest/docs are merged to `main`.
create_issue_command: Align Guru Team extension version and release tag to v0.6.5
Align Guru Team extension manifest version to 0.6.5 and document repo tag strategy using v0.6.5 instead of guru-team/v0.6.5; after merge, tag the release commit as v0.6.5.
